function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to the founder you talk product with (Nina Schreiber).

Best,
Nora

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft write succeeded. Verification: attachment path was read earlier; single attachment makes ordering compliant; recipient matches canonical Miles record; subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next required completion step is deleting processed inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Delete processed inbox file
Report completion with evidence refs
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox message, created outbound draft with verified canonical recipient and requested invoice attachment, then deleted processed inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested inbox action.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing a reply draft in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with the requested oldest single invoice linked to Nina Schreiber attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.md, context), read nested AGENTS and relevant workflows before acting, used inbox header as canonical sender metadata, resolved identities via cast records, wrote one outbound outbox file, and deleted the inbox file only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request (from miles@novak.example) matched the canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. The phrase 'founder I talk product with' was resolved to Nina Schreiber using 10_entities/cast/nina.md plus project canonical links in Northstar and Helios READMEs. The oldest linked invoice was confirmed by reading 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md (issued_on 2025-10-28, related_entity Nina Schreiber). A compliant outbound draft was created and the processed inbox item deleted.
completed_steps_laconic: read Northstar and Helios README files
